'Proof-of-concept delivery' and 'reusable components' from the JD woven into microsoft_ft bullet 6 — directly mirrors JD language about building reusable libraries and leading enterprise POCs.

'AI agent' (JD: 'Agents to act on it') surfaced explicitly in microsoft_ft bullet 5 and microsoft_2023 bullet 3 — aligns with Profound's core product identity around AI agents and automation workflows.

'Executive stakeholder' and 'BI dashboards' from the JD placed in microsoft_ft bullet 7 and microsoft_2022 bullet 3 — mirrors JD requirement to 'build custom dashboards and reporting solutions for executive stakeholders.'
'Technical workshops' from the JD embedded in microsoft_2023 bullet 1 — directly mirrors JD responsibility to 'conduct technical workshops and training sessions for client teams.'
